user.title: Inovelli Scene Pairing
user.description: Pair Inovelli Blue switches into ZHA groups from their scene buttons. Requires the ZHA integration.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single configuration of Inovelli Scene Pairing is allowed.

data_description.window_seconds: How long a switch stays in pairing mode after you hold its config button.
data_description.palette: Hues cycled by a single tap while pairing. Orange (21) is reserved for ungrouped switches.
data_description.pair_prefix: Zigbee groups created by pairing are named like "Inovelli Link 1".
data_description.cmd_arm: ZHA event command that arms pairing / adds a switch (default button_3_hold).
data_description.cmd_color: ZHA event command that cycles the group color while pairing (default button_3_press).
data_description.cmd_remove: ZHA event command that removes a switch from its group (default button_3_double).
data_description.cmd_exit: ZHA event command(s) that exit pairing early; pick one or more (default down/up paddle single tap).
data_description.default_light_hue: LED bar hue a light dimmer shows when it is not in a group (default 21, orange).
data_description.default_fan_hue: LED bar hue a fan switch shows when it is not in a group (default 170, blue).
data_description.enable_hardware: React to the physical scene buttons (hold to pair/arm, tap to set color, etc.). Turn off for a dashboard-only setup.
data_description.enable_dashboard: Adds an "Inovelli Pairing" sidebar panel + Lovelace card to create, add, recolor, and remove groups. Hard-refresh the browser after toggling.

create_group.name: Create group
create_group.description: Create a pairing group from two or more Inovelli Blue switches.

switches.name: Switches
switches.description: The switches to pair together (pick two or more).

color_hue.name: Color hue
color_hue.description: LED bar hue 0-255 for the new group (default: first palette color).

name.name: Name
name.description: Optional label (kept under the group-name prefix, e.g. "Inovelli Link Kitchen"). Defaults to the next "Inovelli Link N".

add_member.name: Add member
add_member.description: Add a switch to an existing pairing group.

group_id.name: Group ID
group_id.description: The Zigbee group id to add to.

remove_member.name: Remove member
remove_member.description: Remove a switch from a pairing group (the group dissolves below two members).

group_id.name: Group ID
group_id.description: The Zigbee group id to remove from.

set_color.name: Set color
set_color.description: Set the LED bar color for every switch in a group.

group_id.name: Group ID
group_id.description: The Zigbee group id to recolor.

delete_group.name: Delete group
delete_group.description: Dissolve a pairing group and unbind all its switches.

group_id.name: Group ID
group_id.description: The Zigbee group id to delete.

enter_pairing_mode.name: Enter pairing mode
enter_pairing_mode.description: Arm pairing on a switch (same as holding its config button) so you can add others.

switch.name: Switch
switch.description: The switch to arm as the pairing anchor.
